textByHashes.cf45e14b671245fbe603428b62dc2addb34ce8a3: You... You must leave this place. It's too... urgh...
textByHashes.890e1ab605bfca6b67e00e6399503bd846f5a65e: ... too dangerous for the likes of you here.
textByHashes.d512627ec1d1f0c980218d850598f8e095a6edbb: My body is... under his control. I can sometimes manage to speak when Zemouregal's concentration is elsewhere, but even then, it's... painful. My mind, however... gahh...
textByHashes.bbfa6c000129fef120638247e992dac6eabb3489: ... is still intact. He left it that way. He wanted me to feel the horror when I... urgh...
textByHashes.94623907de40f269ac90fdeb9ccdfed03e6c40db: My heart... He has it. That's how he... how he... arrgh...
textByHashes.87924fc3e09754f8ae5521c840776abecdef77f6: I'm sorry, he calls to me. I must go. Please, leave... Leave before you...
textByHashes.62b59369e86a63aceccf5b7a2fb7db789dceb3d0: What is this? I feel... free. I can speak without pain. How is this possible?
textByHashes.d6b38437c1b6b39730eff833b1a4e2cccb56e90f: The shield... of course. What do you need to know?
textByHashes.f20d7f64125cffb969e188e3a730311a97d27ab6: It was not I who used the shield. When I faced Zemouregal, I cast the shield to the son of Avarrocka's founder. Only then did the zombies meet their doom.
textByHashes.296a2ada4e1bd88a2f193e4a58ec40dd81e23e96: It was his blood. The shield is tied to Avarrocka. Only one with the blood of the founder can use it.
textByHashes.61194d02dc4d1855dd709ae3fdb520833b645751: Then you can save my home.
textByHashes.90e604cb7466045582fefe4b9a456e5045c1bf53: Wait... It's him! He knows you're here!
textByHashes.f08323fc28a4cc196d348000328f78c30d45a2d1: You... You should not be here. Zemouregal could return at... urgh... at any time. If he does, I won't.... I won't be able to stop myself from... arrgh...
textByHashes.68da9106f8d1a9a0784227ffbff558a54d30e561: Why? You do not... do not know me. You do not know what I've... urgh... what I've done. Leave this place, and leave me. I am... forsaken.
textByHashes.c61b7310bd6741769ec0a022bd24a715063bea04: It's not... here. Zemouregal did not want it too close to his... arrgh... his kin.
textByHashes.e3df5f008ff3d902c9cf9cafb9db11b2db0d5423: In the next room... look behind the... urgh... the flame tapestry. You might be able to find something that can... arrgh... help.
textByHashes.f3b7336020ba143d9a416cf4f9d8cc69cdf7478a: My master calls me... Thank you... whoever you are. I... urgh... I don't even know your name.
